revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-230

Alternative term: Green concrete

Concrete which has completed an initial set but has not properly hardened.


Note: The German word Frischbeton applies to a workable concrete before initial set.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Fresh concrete}}
